wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Belgas looks like a clean fun-sized north coast window for Rare window, High confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 115 kJ, 13 s period, workable consistency 60/100, and good wind at 9 km/h.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Expect: scan from the dunes first because banks and channels shift fast.
best.shortExplanation: Belgas is an open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything · label Rare window, High confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 115 kJ · 13 s period · good wind at 9 km/h.

ranked.explanation: Lagide looks like a clean fun-sized window for Fun progression, High confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 89 kJ, 13 s period, workable consistency 47/100, and good wind at 5 km/h.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small.  Expect: it can get busy, and it is usually more flow than heavy barrel.
ranked.shortExplanation: Lagide is a dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides · label Fun progression, High confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 89 kJ · 13 s period · good wind at 5 km/h.

ranked.explanation: Almagreira looks like a clean fun-sized north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 80 kJ, 13 s period, lully 38/100, and good wind at 9 km/h.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Expect: banks, rips and wind exposure decide whether it is magic or messy.
ranked.shortExplanation: Almagreira is an exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal · label Rare window, Medium confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 80 kJ · 13 s period · good wind at 9 km/h.

ranked.explanation: Meio da Baia looks like a fun-sized window for Worth checking, High confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 101 kJ, 13 s period, consistent 67/100, and wind is not fully clear.  An inconsistent Baía spot that can work well when north-northwest swell reaches the bay; this is best for bodyboard sessions when the bay is clean, there is enough period and size, and the forecast shows a defined wave.  Expect: it is less reliable than the main bay spots, so weak swell or short period can make it feel soft.
ranked.shortExplanation: Meio da Baia is an inconsistent Baía spot that can work well when north-northwest swell reaches the bay · label Worth checking, High confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 101 kJ · 13 s period · wind is not fully clear.
